query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_variants,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isDefault = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as default_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isDefault = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_default_count
FROM product_variants;
